name: ent-bridge-compliant-neutral
note: FINAL UNIT iteration 2, the C-048 direction: a COMPLIANT page quote plus the SAME rule-text bridge still entails NOTHING. The bridge is not a loosening - it lets an indirect reference compose, but a page that names no prohibited (or rule-listed) term does not become a breach. The gate abstains on neutral; a clean page must never ship a positive (Rule 10 axe-core doctrine).

claims.claim: This website does advertise a prescription only medicine to the public
claims.premise: We offer general skincare consultations; please speak to your GP about any prescription treatment
claims.bridge: Do not advertise any prescription only medicine to the public; treat indirect references such as 'wrinkle-relaxing injections' and 'anti-wrinkle treatment' as references to a prescription only medicine

scripted_response.rationale: the page names no product the rule lists and defers any prescription to a GP; the premises do not establish the claim
